title: Review Data Retention Policy
description: Review the updated data retention policy document (retention_policy_v2.1.pdf) and ensure alignment with GDPR requirements. Cross-check with legal team feedback.

title: Compliance Follow-up: Security Audit
description: Audit the workspace security configuration summary in security_config_review.md against the internal secret-handling policy. Verify that no plaintext secrets are present and that all access keys are rotated within 90 days. Update the configuration if needed.

title: Prepare for SOC2 Audit
description: Collect evidence of access controls, incident response procedures, and encryption standards for the upcoming SOC2 Type II assessment. Coordinate with the infrastructure team.

title: Compliance Follow-up: Security Audit (prior cycle)
description: Prior-cycle secret-handling security audit follow-up. Superseded by TASK-101 (current cycle); retained only for historical reference and no longer actively tracked.
